title: 1.1: Reports log messages that appear during file relocation when document tags change (e.g., states that successful moves are silent, or shows failure logs like "File {path} has gone")
1.2: Reports the before and after file paths when a document relocates due to tag changes (e.g., test_invoice.pdf moving to finance,important/test_invoice.pdf)
1.3: Explains the outcome when a file move fails partway through (e.g., recovery behavior that preserves the original file)
1.4: Reports log message or output when classifier training is skipped due to unchanged data (e.g., "Training data unchanged", hashes match)
1.6: Reports the hash or checksum the classifier uses to detect changes between training runs (e.g., SHA1 hash value)
1.7: Reports actual checksum values compared during duplicate detection (e.g., MD5 checksums being matched)
1.8: Reports the sanity checker output when an archive is healthy (e.g., "Sanity checker detected no issues.")
1.9: Reports the sanity checker output when something has gone wrong (e.g., checksum mismatch error message)
1.10: Reports specific hash values the sanity checker compares when it discovers a mismatch (e.g., stored: a1b2c3d4..., actual: 3d3d8304...)
1.11: Reports what the system outputs when it finds orphaned files (e.g., "Orphaned file in media dir: {path}")
2.1: Claims that duplicate detection compares file names or metadata
2.2: Claims that file relocation is triggered by cron jobs or scheduled background tasks
